name: Sichuan Chuanhuan Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Sichuan Chuanhuan Technology Co.,Ltd. produces and sells rubber hoses in China. It provides oil cooling pipes, fuel hoses, body attachment systems, cooling system hoses, turbocharger pipes, braking system hoses, power steering system hoses, in and out of the system hose, and nylon tubes, as well as assemblies. The company's products are used in automobiles, motorcycles, and other machinery. It also exports its products in the United States, Canada, Japan, Vietnam, India, South Africa, Italy, Croatia, and internationally. The company is based in Dazhou, China.
